title: Electric Vehicle Engineer
description: An Electric Vehicle Engineer in India designs, develops, and tests electric vehicles and their components. They work on improving the efficiency, safety, and performance of electric vehicles, and ensure compliance with Indian regulations and standards. They may also collaborate with cross-functional teams, including manufacturing, marketing, and research and development.
degree_name: Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering
top_private_colleges: Sri Sivasubramaniya Nadar College of Engineering
Birla Institute of Technology and Science

career_progression.year_0_2: Assist in design and development of electric vehicles, participate in testing and validation, and work on improving efficiency and performance.
career_progression.year_3_5: Take on leadership roles in design and development teams, work on advanced projects, and collaborate with cross-functional teams.
career_progression.year_6_10: Lead design and development teams, work on strategic projects, and mentor junior engineers.
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Start a company focused on electric vehicle technology, or create a product or service related to electric vehicles.
career_progression.global_pathway: Work with international companies, collaborate on global projects, or pursue further education and research opportunities abroad.

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Starting salary is around ₹4-6 lakhs per annum, with a steep learning curve and long working hours.
common_misconceptions: Electric vehicle engineering is a new field and there are no job opportunities.
Electric vehicle engineering is only about designing electric cars.
